meta.title: Orange Labs — The Community for Marketers Who Build With AI
meta.description: Stop talking about AI. Start building with it. Orange Labs is where 375+ marketers build real AI skills through hands-on experiments, expert guidance, and a clear signal through the noise.

hero.lede: Real AI skills through hands-on experiments, expert guidance, and a clear signal through the noise. No hype, just shipping.

expCard.line: SEO reporting tool, built on a Sunday afternoon

whatIs.heading: Stop talking about AI. Start building with it.
whatIs.body: Orange Labs is where marketers stop watching tutorials and start shipping real AI tools. Every feature is built around doing, with community, guidance, and accountability to keep you moving.
checks: Share wins, get feedback, and never build alone
Connect with marketers actively building with AI
Learn live: workshops, hackathons, and expert sessions

problem.heading: Why most marketers are AI stuck

cards.title: Generic learning
cards.body: You've watched the YouTube videos, read the LinkedIn posts, even taken a course or two. But you still don't have a single AI tool in production.
cards.answer: We give you actionable workflows you can ship tomorrow morning.

cards.title: Building in isolation
cards.body: AI moves fast and most of your peers are in the same boat. Figuring it out alone means slow progress and a lot of wasted time.
cards.answer: Experience a community of builders who share what works, what doesn't, and what's next.

cards.title: The "technical" gap
cards.body: Most training is either "too basic" (surface-level prompting) or "too hard" (complex engineering). Neither helps you do your actual job better.
cards.answer: We bridge the gap: powerful AI tools explained in plain marketing language.

steps.heading: Your first week in the lab

items.title: Join and introduce yourself
items.html: Tell 375+ builders who you are and what you want to build. You'll get replies the same day.

items.title: Pick your first experiment
items.html: Grab a proven prompt or workflow from the Steal This library, or bring the half-built idea sitting in your drafts.

items.title: Ship it at the next hackathon
items.html: Get unstuck live with the group, then post your win. That's the whole culture.

cards.title: Hackathon sessions
cards.html: Stop struggling alone. Bring your unfinished AI projects and get unstuck in real-time. What takes weeks to solve solo, we solve together in 90 minutes.

cards.title: Hands-on AI implementation
cards.html: We don't do passive webinars. These are working sessions where you open your laptop, follow along, and leave with a finished asset, not just more notes.

cards.title: A network of AI builders
cards.html: Trade ideas with marketers who are actually using AI, not just talking about it. A safe space to share failures, experiments, and wins without judgment.

cards.title: The "Steal This" library
cards.html: Don't start from scratch. A curated vault of battle-tested prompts, Python scripts, and workflows you can copy/paste directly into your marketing operations.

origin.heading: Built by demand. Not a business plan.
origin.lede: Graduates of the top-rated Actionable AI course kept asking for:
checks: A place to stay current on new tools and models
A space to share AI wins with people who get it
Working demos that don't require reading technical docs

results.heading: Members ship real tools
results.quote: "It gives me entities as well, entities that are similar. I built an SEO reporting tool on a Sunday afternoon."
results.whoDetail: Apartment SEO Co-Founder · no programming background

tiers.name: The Community
tiers.best: marketers who need ongoing support and a safe space to experiment.
includes: Safe lab environment with peer support
Curated AI news, minus the hype

tiers.name: The Accelerator
tiers.best: marketers who need to up-skill and ship a specific AI solution ASAP.
includes: 8 live sessions with AI expert guests
Build a real project in 4 weeks

tiers.name: Enterprise AI Training
tiers.best: teams and agencies building an AI-first culture.
includes: AI workflows for your goals and tasks
Team access to Orange Labs for 1 year

items.q: I'm not technical. Will I keep up?
items.a: Orange Labs exists because most AI training is either too basic or too technical. Everything here is explained in plain marketing language, and members with zero programming background ship real tools. Martin built an SEO reporting tool on a Sunday afternoon.

items.q: How much time does this take?
items.a: Most members start with one 90-minute session a week and the Steal This library between sessions. Sessions are working time, not homework: you leave with a finished asset.

No. Courses give you notes. The Lab gives you reps: live hackathons, feedback on your actual work, and a community that expects you to ship. The Accelerator course is there when you want to go deeper.

items.q: What if it's not for me?
items.a: Try it for 7 days risk-free and cancel any time. No waitlist, no lock-in, no hard feelings.

band.heading: Let's fail fast, start messy & succeed together
